sections.title: The 'ch' Sound
sections.description: Words with the ch sound at the beginning, middle, or end

questions.prompt: Which word has the 'ch' sound at the BEGINNING?
questions.hint: Look for the word that starts with 'ch'

questions.prompt: Which word has the 'ch' sound in the MIDDLE?
questions.hint: The 'ch' sound is between other letters

questions.prompt: Which word has the 'ch' sound at the END?
questions.hint: Look for the word that ends with 'ch'

questions.prompt: Choose the correct word: We sit on a _____ at school.
questions.hint: This word starts with 'ch' and you sit on it

questions.prompt: Which word rhymes with 'much'?
questions.hint: Find the word that sounds like 'much' at the end

questions.prompt: What do we call a baby chicken?
questions.hint: This word starts with 'ch'

questions.prompt: Which word has the 'ch' sound?
questions.hint: Listen for the 'ch' sound, not 'sh'

questions.prompt: Complete: The _____ has many books.
questions.hint: A place where people worship

questions.prompt: Which word means to grab something?
questions.hint: You do this with a ball

questions.prompt: Where do we cook food?
questions.hint: This word has 'ch' in the middle

sections.title: The 'th' Sound (Voiceless)
sections.description: Words with the soft th sound like in 'think' and 'bath'

questions.prompt: Which word has the voiceless 'th' sound like in 'think'?
questions.hint: Numbers often have the soft 'th' sound

questions.prompt: What is the fifth day of the week?
questions.hint: This day has 'th' at the beginning

questions.prompt: Which word means the opposite of 'north'?
questions.hint: This direction has 'th' at the end

questions.prompt: What helps us chew our food?
questions.hint: This word has 'th' at the end

questions.prompt: What are the big fingers on our hands called?
questions.hint: This word starts with 'th'

questions.prompt: What tells us how hot or cold something is?
questions.hint: This word starts with 'th'

questions.prompt: What do we use when we sew?
questions.hint: This thin string starts with 'th'

questions.prompt: What number comes after twelve?
questions.hint: This number has 'th' in it

questions.prompt: What brush do we use for our teeth?
questions.hint: This compound word has 'th' in it

questions.prompt: How many is 'one thousand'?
questions.hint: Thousand starts with 'th'

sections.title: The 'th' Sound (Voiced)
sections.description: Words with the buzzing th sound like in 'the' and 'this'

questions.prompt: Which word has the voiced 'th' sound like in 'the'?
questions.hint: Put your fingers on your throat - you feel it vibrate

questions.prompt: I am made from the skin of animals and used for bags and shoes. I am _____.
questions.hint: This word has 'th' in the middle

questions.prompt: People wear me to cover their bodies and keep warm. I am _____.
questions.hint: This word has 'th' in the middle

questions.prompt: I am often the head of the family. My children have my surname. I am the _____.
questions.hint: This family member has 'th' in the middle

questions.prompt: What word describes the conditions outside (sunny, rainy, cloudy)?
questions.hint: This word has 'th' in the middle

questions.prompt: Which word is a compound word with 'th'?
questions.hint: A compound word is made of two words joined together

questions.prompt: Count the letters in 'thermometer'. Is it odd or even?
questions.hint: T-H-E-R-M-O-M-E-T-E-R has 11 letters

questions.prompt: Which word means 'in spite of that'?
questions.hint: This word has 'th' in the middle

questions.prompt: What is another word for 'smooth'?
questions.hint: This is the superlative form with 'th'

questions.prompt: Which word has 'th' at the beginning, middle, AND is a compound word?
questions.hint: Rain with thunder and lightning

sections.title: The Hard 'c' Sound
sections.description: When 'c' sounds like 'k' (before a, o, u)

questions.prompt: Which word has the hard 'c' sound like 'k'?
questions.hint: Hard 'c' comes before a, o, or u

questions.prompt: A young cow is called a _____.
questions.hint: This word has the hard 'c' sound

questions.prompt: Which bird is yellow and sings?
questions.hint: This bird's name starts with hard 'c'

questions.prompt: The farmer plants _____ and cabbage.
questions.hint: Orange vegetables that grow underground

questions.prompt: Mother made a _____ for my birthday.
questions.hint: A sweet treat for celebrations

questions.prompt: Which word has the hard 'c' sound at the END?
questions.hint: The 'c' at the end sounds like 'k'

questions.prompt: Which animal gives us milk?
questions.hint: This farm animal has the hard 'c' sound

questions.prompt: A boat that Native Americans used is called a _____.
questions.hint: You paddle this on water

questions.prompt: Which Jamaican food starts with hard 'c'?
questions.hint: A green leafy vegetable in Jamaica

questions.prompt: Which word does NOT have the hard 'c' sound?
questions.hint: Soft 'c' comes before e, i, or y

sections.title: The Soft 'c' Sound
sections.description: When 'c' sounds like 's' (before e, i, y)

questions.prompt: Which word has the soft 'c' sound like 's'?
questions.hint: Soft 'c' comes before e, i, or y

questions.prompt: A place where dead people are buried is a _____.
questions.hint: This word starts with soft 'c'

questions.prompt: A period of one hundred years is a _____.
questions.hint: This word starts with soft 'c'

questions.prompt: A travelling show with clowns and animals is a _____.
questions.hint: This word starts with soft 'c'

questions.prompt: A person who rides a bicycle is a _____.
questions.hint: This word has soft 'c' before 'y'

questions.prompt: A room under a house is called a _____.
questions.hint: This word starts with soft 'c'

questions.prompt: What we eat sometimes for breakfast is _____.
questions.hint: This word starts with soft 'c'

questions.prompt: Grey powder used for building houses is _____.
questions.hint: This word starts with soft 'c'

questions.prompt: A round shape is called a _____.
questions.hint: This shape word has soft 'c'

questions.prompt: Which word has BOTH hard and soft 'c' sounds?
questions.hint: The first 'c' is soft, the second is hard

questions.prompt: Which word has the hard 'g' sound?
questions.hint: Hard 'g' usually comes before a, o, or u

questions.prompt: Where do we grow flowers and vegetables?
questions.hint: This outdoor space starts with hard 'g'

questions.prompt: A Jamaican fruit that is round and green is a _____.
questions.hint: This tropical fruit has hard 'g'

questions.prompt: We play _____ with our friends.
questions.hint: Fun activities we do together

questions.prompt: A place where we keep our car is a _____.
questions.hint: This building has hard 'g'

questions.prompt: Water runs through a _____ on the roof.
questions.hint: This carries rainwater away

questions.prompt: Unscramble 'msega' to make a word with hard 'g'.
questions.hint: Rearrange the letters: m-s-e-g-a

questions.prompt: A place where vehicles are fixed is a _____.
questions.hint: Mechanics work here

questions.prompt: An animal that has a kid as its young is a _____.
questions.hint: This farm animal has hard 'g'

questions.prompt: Which word has the hard 'g' sound at the END?
questions.hint: The 'g' at the end sounds hard, not soft

sections.title: The Soft 'g' Sound
sections.description: When 'g' sounds like 'j' (before e, i, y)

questions.prompt: Which word has the soft 'g' sound like 'j'?
questions.hint: Soft 'g' often comes before e, i, or y

questions.prompt: A tall animal with a long neck is a _____.
questions.hint: This animal has soft 'g'

questions.prompt: A person who is kind and not rough is _____.
questions.hint: This word has soft 'g' before 'e'

questions.prompt: A spicy root used in cooking is _____.
questions.hint: This spice has soft 'g'

questions.prompt: A place where we exercise is a _____.
questions.hint: This word has soft 'g' before 'y'

questions.prompt: Something that uses electricity is _____.
questions.hint: Cars have this - it has soft 'g'

questions.prompt: A person who designs and builds things is an _____.
questions.hint: This job has soft 'g' in the middle

questions.prompt: Something done in an urgent situation is an _____.
questions.hint: This word has soft 'g' in the middle

questions.prompt: A drink made from oranges is _____.
questions.hint: This drink has soft 'g' at the end

questions.prompt: Which word does NOT have the soft 'g' sound?
questions.hint: This word has hard 'g' before 'o'

sections.title: The 'sh' Sound
sections.description: Words with the sh sound at the beginning, middle, or end

questions.prompt: Which word has the 'sh' sound at the BEGINNING?
questions.hint: Look for the word that starts with 'sh'

questions.prompt: Which word has the 'sh' sound in the MIDDLE?
questions.hint: The 'sh' sound is between other letters

questions.prompt: Which word has the 'sh' sound at the END?
questions.hint: Look for the word that ends with 'sh'

questions.prompt: A young sheep is called a _____.
questions.hint: Baby sheep - but 'sheep' has the 'sh' sound!

questions.prompt: The knife is not dull. It is _____.
questions.hint: This word starts with 'sh'

questions.prompt: We can buy food at the _____.
questions.hint: A place to buy things - starts with 'sh'

questions.prompt: Every family needs food, _____ and clothing.
questions.hint: A place to live - starts with 'sh'

questions.prompt: I am going to use _____ to wash my hair.
questions.hint: This hair product starts with 'sh'

questions.prompt: What is the plural of 'ashtray'?
questions.hint: Just add 's' to make it plural

questions.prompt: A machine that washes dishes is a _____.
questions.hint: This compound word has 'sh' in both parts

questions.prompt: Unscramble 'ihfs' to make a word with 'sh'.
questions.hint: Rearrange: i-h-f-s

questions.prompt: A man who catches fish is a _____.
questions.hint: This job has 'sh' in the middle

sections.title: Rhyming Words
sections.description: Find words that sound the same at the end

questions.prompt: Which word rhymes with 'tag'?
questions.hint: Find the word that ends with the same sound as 'tag'

questions.prompt: Which word rhymes with 'bag'?
questions.hint: Both words end in '-ag'

questions.prompt: Which word rhymes with 'dog'?
questions.hint: Both words end in '-og'

questions.prompt: Which word rhymes with 'slug'?
questions.hint: Both words end in '-ug'

questions.prompt: Which word rhymes with 'meeting'?
questions.hint: Both words end in '-eating'

questions.prompt: Which word rhymes with 'much'?
questions.hint: Both words end in '-uch'

questions.prompt: Which word rhymes with 'beach'?
questions.hint: Both words end in '-each'

questions.prompt: Which word rhymes with 'fish'?
questions.hint: Both words end in '-ish'

questions.prompt: Which word rhymes with 'bath'?
questions.hint: Both words end in '-ath'

questions.prompt: Which word rhymes with 'think'?
questions.hint: Both words end in '-ink'
